title: types: SpaceUpdateInput + 4 sub-types
description:
What: Add SpaceUpdateInput and its sub-types to mod.rs. Scope: metadata + member management only (not role/channel/category management — those are out of scope for this epic).

Algorithm:
1. SpaceAddMemberInput<'a>: id: &'a str, role_ids: Option<&'a [&'a str]>
2. SpaceUpdateMemberInput<'a>: id: &'a str, role_ids: Option<&'a [&'a str]>, nick: Option<Option<&'a str>>
3. SpaceAddChannelInput<'a>: name: &'a str, category_id: Option<&'a str>, position: Option<u64>, topic: Option<&'a str>
4. SpaceRemoveChannelInput: just &str (not a struct — list of channel ids), use &[&str] directly
5. SpaceUpdateInput<'a> (no Default, id required):
   id: &'a str
   name: Option<&'a str>
   description: Option<Option<&'a str>>  (Some(None)=clear)
   icon_blob_id: Option<Option<&'a str>>  (Some(None)=clear)
   is_public: Option<bool>
   is_publicly_previewable: Option<bool>
   add_members: &'a [SpaceAddMemberInput<'a>]
   remove_members: &'a [&'a str]
   update_members: &'a [SpaceUpdateMemberInput<'a>]
   add_channels: &'a [SpaceAddChannelInput<'a>]
   remove_channels: &'a [&'a str]

Note: omit role/category management from SpaceUpdateInput entirely (out of scope).

Run cargo fmt, clippy -D warnings, test. Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; SpaceUpdateInput + SpaceAddMemberInput + SpaceUpdateMemberInput + SpaceAddChannelInput in mod.rs; clippy clean
close_reason: SpaceAddMemberInput, SpaceUpdateMemberInput, SpaceAddChannelInput, SpaceUpdateInput added to mod.rs
